description: 600 A track busway run (straight sections to make one run)
spec: 600 A continuous, 3-phase 4-wire + ground, 415/240 Vac Wye, UL 857 / IEC 61439-6, open-channel tap-off anywhere along run, hot-aisle overhead mount
alternates: Vertiv PowerBar iMPB (Cu 600 A); Schneider Canalis KS
notes: Run length approx 46 ft nominal (4 bays x 121 in = 40.3 ft rack zone + end-feed stub) - total approx 368 ft. Footage is [W] until LAYOUT-01 layout drawing; quote per-foot plus per-section.

spec: 600 A end feed with lug termination for contractor feeder conductors from RPP, matching busway series
notes: One per run. Feeder conductors and conduit by install contractor (excluded).

spec: Vendor standard drop/bracket kit suitable for mounting to HAC cross-aisle beams (HSS steel) per Deschutes 18.7 - placement fungible
notes: Est. 10 per run at approx 5 ft spacing. Weights feed ELE-OI-03 (LA-PE structural input, with HAC-OI-01).

spec: Series section-to-section joints as required for approx 10 ft sections
notes: Quantity follows final section breakdown - vendor to confirm with layout.
